[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0100010 2
1 0101010 3
2 0000111 3
3 1011000 3
4 1101111 6
5 0011010 3
6 1010110 4
7 1111010 5

72 27 0001110 3
